labels.533: Phrases or titles in all caps that describe events, products, or promotional activities.
labels.732: Proper nouns, titles, or organization names that begin sentences or clauses.
labels.871: Author names or citations separated by commas and "and" conjunctions in academic or formal lists.
labels.1248: Numbered list items or track listings where content appears between numerical markers or dashes.
labels.1314: Transitions between distinct topics or sections in informal text passages.
labels.2480: The feature fires on commas separating names or list items in text.
labels.2809: URLs and hyperlinks being split or fragmented across token boundaries.
labels.3154: The feature activates on punctuation or special characters marking boundaries between distinct sections, titles, or quoted content.
labels.3814: Transitions between topic headers or section dividers and descriptive content that follows them.
labels.4006: Text passages introducing or attributing content to organizations, people, or instructional topics.
labels.4303: Proper nouns or titles of organizations, locations, and institutions that appear at phrase boundaries.
labels.4330: The feature activates on person names followed by their location, title, or organizational affiliation.
labels.4556: Phrases introducing or referencing names, titles, organizations, or proper nouns that follow immediately after.
labels.5272: The feature fires on proper names or personal identifiers (people's names, often with titles or locations) appearing in parentheses or appositive phrases.
labels.5794: Titles, headers, or introductory phrases that begin sections or articles.
labels.6148: Transitions between clause/phrase endings and new information or attributions (like citations, explanations, or continuations).
labels.6460: Text beginning with colons or quotation marks followed by capitalized words or names.
labels.6805: Capitalized text or promotional phrases separated by formatting markers (>>>/<<<) indicating content boundaries or emphasis.
labels.7299: The feature fires on the digit "2" followed by other digits or numbers forming dates, years, or numeric values.
labels.7428: URLs and domain names being split or interrupted mid-token.
labels.7455: Feature activates on phrases introducing or beginning new topics, actions, or sections.
labels.7877: Phrases that introduce or reference a specific person, entity, or proper noun before additional context or attribution.
labels.8146: The feature activates on imperative or action-oriented phrases that introduce topics, suggestions, or calls to engagement.
labels.8190: Proper nouns and named entities (people, places, brands, software commands) appearing in isolation or at clause boundaries.
labels.8262: Text preceding a quoted name, title, or specific entity that the feature isolates.
labels.8538: The feature activates on editorial introductory phrases and attributions that mark the beginning of distinct text segments or quoted material.
labels.8685: Quoted phrases or words enclosed in quotation marks that appear mid-sentence.
labels.8768: Phrases introducing or explaining what follows, often with "is" or "to" constructions describing purposes or plans.
labels.9351: The feature activates on editorial introductions, attribution phrases, and organizational/institutional references that introduce content or speakers.
labels.9732: Words that typically begin product descriptions, promotional content, or informational headers.
labels.10382: Phrases introducing or labeling organizational, institutional, or informational content that follows.
labels.11075: Capitalized text phrases or headers preceded by punctuation marks or whitespace.
labels.11186: Feature activates on possessive or organizational phrases introducing community topics or product listings.
labels.12035: Phrases in all caps appearing between lowercase or punctuation text, often promotional or attention-grabbing statements.
labels.12109: Titles, headers, or introductory phrases that mark section beginnings or citations.
labels.12171: Titles, headings, or introductory phrases that mark the beginning of a new section or topic.
labels.13006: Phrases or text passages that serve as section headers, titles, or introductory markers in documents.
labels.13252: Proper nouns or entity names appearing at the end of quoted or demarcated text sections.
labels.13531: Phrases or clauses enclosed between quotation marks or special formatting markers indicating metadata, attributions, or conditional statements.
labels.14941: Transition phrases introducing topics, products, or content sections in promotional or informational text.
labels.15223: Phrases or titles enclosed in or preceded by specific formatting that mark section headers, document titles, or named entity references.
labels.15263: Hyperlinks or URLs being split across the activation boundaries.
labels.15482: The feature fires on proper nouns or names followed by descriptive text or context.
labels.15953: Text passages containing brand names, product names, or proper nouns that are emphasized or set apart.
labels.16013: URL or encoded strings being split across token boundaries.
labels.16551: Sentence fragments or incomplete clauses that introduce topics, lists, or titles without complete grammatical structure.
labels.17136: Phrases introducing the main clause or topic after a dependent clause or introductory phrase.
labels.17461: Blank or minimal text immediately preceding where the feature activates.
labels.17898: The feature activates on capitalized or emphasized text that appears to be titles, labels, or proper nouns set apart from surrounding content.
labels.17950: The feature activates on text segments containing forward slashes or hyphens that separate dates, measurements, or categorical divisions.
